meta.title: OsteoLocal — Osteopathy Practice Software | No Subscription
meta.description: The most complete osteopathy practice management software. 240+ features, 100% offline, lifetime license from €550. Free 3-month trial.

meta.ogDescription: Patients, calendar, invoicing, advanced analytics — installed on your computer. Your data stays with you. Forever.

hero.title: Your osteopathy practice deserves software that matches.
hero.subtitle: The most complete practice management software on the market — patients, calendar, invoicing, advanced analytics — all installed on your computer. Your data stays with you. Forever.

calculator.title: Do the math.
calculator.callout: That's the equivalent of {count} free consultations.
calculator.footnote: Comparison based on an average SaaS subscription at €20/month. Some software charges €30–50/month.

features.title: A complete professional tool.
features.subtitle: Over 240 built-in features. Zero paid add-ons.

cards.title: Complete patient records
cards.description: Detailed patient file with medical history, allergies, contraindications, medications (BDPM database), pathologies (ICD-10 codes), and full consultation history.

cards.title: Smart calendar
cards.description: Four views (day, week, month, rolling agenda), drag & drop, recurring appointments, conflict detection.

cards.title: Real-time session capture
cards.description: Integrated capture panel in the patient profile. Chief complaint, pain before/after (VAS scale), clinical exam, treatment — all without leaving the file.
points: Rich text editor with drug mentions

cards.title: Professional invoicing
cards.description: Full invoice lifecycle: auto-creation, payment tracking, credit notes, reminders, and PDF generation.

cards.title: Analytical dashboard
cards.description: 8 analysis tabs, from practice health score to cross-insights by profession, sport, age — with predictions.
points: Revenue heatmap by day and hour

cards.title: Integrated document management
cards.description: Drag & drop upload, categorization, full-text search, directly linked to patient records.

cards.title: Your data, your peace of mind
cards.description: Automatic backup, optional encryption, verified restoration, complete audit log.

cards.title: BDPM & ICD-10 built-in
cards.description: French Public Drug Database with auto-sync, ICD-10 codes, ROME nomenclature — all local.

Switch to full license anytime (amount deducted)

pricing.loaExplainer: Lease-to-Own (LOA): like a car lease, you pay monthly and at the end of the plan, the software is permanently yours. Unlike a SaaS subscription, every euro paid brings you closer to ownership.
pricing.trialCallout: 3 months free. No credit card. No commitment.

migration.title: Already using another software?
migration.description: Switching to OsteoLocal doesn't mean starting from scratch. Our team migrates your data for free from your current software.
data: Patients: names, contacts, medical history, documents
Consultation history: notes, chief complaints, treatments
migration.compatible: Osteo2ls, Doctogest, Ostéolib, Vetocom, and any software with CSV/Excel export.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: your data from your current software (we'll guide you)

security.title: Your patient data

points.title: 100% local
points.description: SQLite database on your hard drive, no remote server

points.title: No cloud account
points.description: The software works even without Internet

points.title: GDPR compliant

security.quote: With cloud software, your patient data sits on someone else's server. With OsteoLocal, it's in your office. Period.

items.quote: I used a competing SaaS for 6 years. It cost me over €1,400. OsteoLocal does everything it did, and much more, for a fraction of the price. And my data is finally mine.
items.name: Dr. Martin L.

items.quote: Coming out of school, I didn't have €500 to spend on software. The €15/month plan let me start smoothly. In 3 years, it'll be mine.
items.name: Camille R.

items.quote: The analytics dashboard is stunning — practice health score, retention tracking, chief complaint analysis by profession. No other osteopathy software offers this level of detail.
items.name: Julien T.

items.a: Yes, 3 months free, no credit card, no commitment. Download, install, use. If you like it, buy it.
The software continues in read-only mode for 30 additional days so you can export your data. You don't lose anything.

items.q: What if I need help installing?
items.a: The onboarding wizard guides you step by step: practice info, session types, pricing, email, backup. Ready in 10 minutes.

items.q: Does it work on Mac and Windows?
items.a: Yes. OsteoLocal works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Your data is stored locally on your computer in a SQLite database. No data travels over the Internet. Backups can be encrypted. You have total control.
Yes. Updates are free and you're notified automatically. You choose when to install.

items.q: I'm on a lease-to-own plan and want the full license?
items.a: The amount already paid is deducted from the €550. You simply pay the difference.

items.q: Can I use the software on multiple computers?
items.a: The license is tied to one workstation. For a second one (e.g., home + office), contact us for a discounted multi-seat license.

items.q: What if my computer breaks down?
items.a: Your backups (automatic and manual) let you restore all your data on a new machine in minutes. The license is transferable.

items.q: Which software do you migrate from?
items.a: Any software that allows CSV or Excel export. We also support specific formats from Osteo2ls, Doctogest, Ostéolib. Migration is free and assisted.
The trial is free for 3 months. If it's not for you, uninstall. No fees, no penalty, no questions asked.

finalCta.title: Ready to take back control
